creator: vlmantemp@yandex.ru
text:
While option XCLIENT=on is selected patch "extra-patch-xclient" fails to apply for exim-4.76

Fix: Replace file "extra-patch-xclient" with the attached one.
How-To-Repeat: 	# cd /usr/ports/mail/exim
	# make config
	*set option XCLIENT=on*
	# make
	Results to:
	...
	===>  Applying extra patch /a/ports/mail/exim/files/extra-patch-xclient
	1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to src/globals.c.rej
	1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to src/globals.h.rej
	*** Error code 2
